# Operations Documentation Instructions

Use this file for work that writes or updates `docs/operations/`.

## Source of truth

- `.github/workflows/`
- `deploy/`
- `compose.yaml`
- `compose.production.yaml`
- `Dockerfile`
- current production deployment model and smoke checks

## Cover

- local setup
- deployment workflow
- CI/CD behavior
- environment expectations
- verification steps
- rollback and troubleshooting

## Do not confuse with

- product behavior docs
- backend internal implementation docs
- architecture rationale beyond what operators need
